name: YouTube Video Monitor
description: Canonical browser-monitoring pack: open a YouTube video, keep it playing, take screenshots every 30 seconds for 3 minutes, and attach a short 5-second audio note to each checkpoint.

observationPlan.statusChangeHint: Use playback progress and player state changes as the observation heartbeat.
observationPlan.notes: Best used with the orb interval mode or a future scheduler that consumes pack metadata.

queue.consumerHint: A downstream analyzer can inspect each frame for scene changes, captions, or overlay states.
queue.analysisHint: Treat each 30-second frame as a checkpoint and correlate it with the 5-second audio note captured around that moment.
